title: Immersive Divinity
description: A compatibility mod for Immersive Portals to work with DivineRPG! WARNING!! DEPRECATED!! Go to my new mod Immersive Infinity! It's this mod but compatible with even more mods!!
body: Immersive Portals + DivineRPG. Requires Sinytra Connector for Immersive Portals as it's Forge variant is only up to 1.19.3. Should work for servers.
